title: butea loureiroi
intro: Butea loureiroi, also known as Dalbergia odorifera or Dalbergia variabilis, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in China, India, and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat conditions such as fever, inflammation, and infections, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Butea loureiroi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antibacterial and antifungal agent. Butea loureiroi is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including tea, capsules, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
